action-wizard-basic-info-action-id-colli: This ID is already used by another node in the model.
action-wizard-basic-info-action-id-hint: A unique snake_case identifier for this action.
action-wizard-basic-info-desc: Give the copied action a new identity. The ID must be unique within the model.
action-wizard-basic-info-display-name-hi: Human-readable name shown in the UI.
action-wizard-data-source-config-desc: Choose where the copied action will get its impact data. The system will not assume the original dataset binding carries over.
action-wizard-data-source-new-unavailabl: New dataset creation will be available in a future version. For now, create the dataset through the Datasets admin and reference it here.
action-wizard-data-source-selector-colum: The column used to filter rows for this action. Usually "action".
action-wizard-data-source-selector-value: The value that identifies this action's rows in the dataset.
action-wizard-edge-config-desc: Configure how each output metric is routed to its target node. These mappings were copied from the source action and can be edited, removed, or extended.
action-wizard-edge-config-no-mappings: No edge mappings. The source action had no outgoing edges.
action-wizard-outputs-desc: These output metrics were copied from the source action. Metrics with existing edge mappings are shown as wired. Unwired metrics will need connections configured in the next step.
action-wizard-outputs-no-metrics-desc: The source action has no output ports defined.
datasets-attaching-dimensions-not-implem: Attaching dimensions is not yet implemented on the backend.
datasets-category-not-used: Not used by any data point
datasets-create-data-source-no-payload: Create data source returned no payload.
datasets-creating-metrics-not-implemente: Creating metrics is not yet implemented on the backend.
datasets-creating-not-implemented: Creating datasets is not yet implemented.
datasets-data-grid-no-backing: Year cell with no backing DataPoint
datasets-datapoint-no-value: This data point has no value.
datasets-select-datapoint-for-details: Select a data point in the grid to see its details.
datasets-deleting-metrics-not-implemente: Deleting metrics is not yet implemented on the backend.
datasets-detaching-dimensions-not-implem: Detaching dimensions is not yet implemented on the backend.
datasets-editing-metrics-not-implemented: Editing metrics is not yet implemented on the backend.
datasets-external-source-info: This is an external placeholder dataset. Data points are stored in the external repository and are not editable here.
datasets-no-categories: No categories used by any data point.
datasets-no-comments-all: No comments on any data point yet.
datasets-no-comments-datapoint: No comments on the selected data point yet.
datasets-no-data-sources-available: No data sources defined in this instance yet.
datasets-no-nodes-bound: No nodes are bound to this dataset.
datasets-no-sources-attached-datapoint: No sources attached to this data point.
datasets-no-sources-attached-datapoints: No sources attached to any data point.
datasets-no-sources-attached-dataset: No sources attached to the dataset.
datasets-saving-metadata-not-implemented: Saving dataset metadata is not yet implemented on the backend.
dimensions-creating-not-implemented: Creating dimensions is not yet implemented.
dimensions-no-categories: No categories yet. Add one to get started.
editor-cards-datasets-desc: Manage datasets that feed node inputs.
editor-cards-nodes-desc: Edit the causal graph: nodes, edges, and formulas.
editor-draft-mode-disabled: Draft mode is not yet available — all edits apply directly to the published model.
editor-draft-no-changes: The draft has no changes over the published revision.
editor-draft-up-to-date: Draft · up to date with published
editor-mock-preview: Mock preview · edits to short name, description, node group and action group are not yet persisted
editor-never-published-bootstrap: This model has never been published. Public readers see the draft as a bootstrap.
editor-no-edit-access-desc: You don't have edit access to {instanceName}. Ask an administrator of this model to grant you access, or switch to a model you can edit.
editor-no-published-revision: No published revision exists yet — showing the draft.
editor-read-only-desc: Read-only: you're viewing the published revision. Switch to Draft mode to edit.
editor-stale-version: This model was edited in another tab. Reload to see the latest changes.
editor-unpublished-changes: Edits to this model have not been published yet.
models-no-edit-access: You don't have edit access to any models yet.
settings-desc: Manage your preferences for the model editor.
settings-interface-language-desc: The language used for the editor interface. This only affects the editor chrome — the content you edit stays in the model's language.
settings-single-language: Only one interface language is available ({name}).
users-add-user-desc: Add an existing user as an admin of {instanceName}. If they don't have an account yet, we'll offer to send an invitation.
users-admin-only: Only model admins can manage users. Ask an admin of {instanceName} if you need to invite or remove users.
users-email-not-found-desc: No account exists for {email}. Send an invitation email with a sign-up link?
users-no-users: No users have access to this model yet.
users-not-member: Not a member of this model — shown because superusers can access every model.
users-pending-invitations-desc: Invitations that haven't been accepted yet.
users-people-with-access: People with access to this model.
